src: A cream-colored textured jacket with four metal buttons and woven trim detailing around the collar and pockets, featuring a cropped, tailored fit.
edit: A luxurious two-toned Chanel-inspired jacket with elegant silver embellishments and intricate embroidered trim, maintaining a sophisticated, fitted style.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object is worn on a person, seen from the waist up, slightly front-facing. The background is a plain light-colored wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is hanging on a hook, front-facing. The background consists of a light, textured wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is laid flat on a soft blanket, with its arms neatly arranged. The background is a textured fabric in a muted blue shade.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object hangs on a blue hanger, tilted slightly. The background is a smooth white wall, adding contrast to the object.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object hangs on a blue hanger, front-facing directly. The background is a plain white wall, slightly shadowed.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object is worn on a person, seen from the waist up, slightly front-facing. The background features luxury decor with soft, plush textures and golden accents.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object is hanging on a hook, front-facing. The background features an opulent, textured wall with subtle gold patterns.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is laid flat on a plush, silk-like blanket, with its arms neatly arranged. The background is a luxurious fabric in rich, deep blue tones.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object hangs on a blue hanger, tilted slightly. The background is a smooth, elegant white wall with a pearl-like sheen, adding a luxurious touch.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object hangs on a blue hanger, front-facing directly. The background is an ornate white wall with subtle shadowing and intricate detailing.
